userFeatureLog.userWords: biggest upgrade: scenery and less emoji style, pixel art or free svg, place in all the game, 1/4
userFeatureLog.code: SceneryArt (cached offscreen pixel tiles), drawSceneryTile, far skyline per thema, pixel wolken/bomen, grond-speckles
userFeatureLog.note: PLAN 4 delen — 1) scenery pixel-art parallax (v1.15.0, DONE): skyline/wolken/bomen/grond alle 7 thema's, cached tiles, smoothing-off; 2) menu & schermen: emoji-iconen op knoppen → inline SVG; 3) in-game UI: pickups/floaters/banners getekende iconen ipv ✦★⚑; 4) final pass: achievements/dex-iconen, weer-per-thema, rest-emoji review. Volgende agent: zeg 'deel 2' → SVG-iconen in index.html knoppen

userFeatureLog.userWords: Summoning is real, really small chance for a summons, upgrading mediocre lower level items going Epic or Legendary, over the power of higher level weapons
userFeatureLog.code: save.summons, SUMMON_BOOST, summonEligibleWeapons, applySummonTier, playerWeapon, maybeSummon (kill-kans ~0.7% + pity), renderWeapons ✦ badge
userFeatureLog.note: off-d20 user feature; epic ×1.55 / legendary ×1.95 dmg, gem. ~97 kills per summon, getest in echte Chrome

userFeatureLog.userWords: Balancing please, leveling pace, game needs to take a wee bit more time
userFeatureLog.code: xpNeed pace-factor (+15% vroeg tot +50% vanaf ~Lv18), trainWins XP-cap min(trainWins,12)
userFeatureLog.note: off-d20 user feature; alleen XP-curve/cap, geen dmg of rewards-feel aangepast

userFeatureLog.userWords: character screens in twee delen, saga icons, 2 spelers
userFeatureLog.note: d20 #18 — geen nieuwe roll; zie handoff.md

userFeatureLog.userWords: mikken met joycon/wapen hoog, vliegers/vogels schieten
userFeatureLog.code: projAimVelocity, flyers in coinrun, aim preview line

userFeatureLog.userWords: joycon omhoog mikken zodat wapen/werper hoger slaat of gooit
userFeatureLog.code: fighterAimNorm, meleeHitPoint, projAimVelocity, spawnJutsu aim, aim preview
userFeatureLog.note: off-d20 user feature; d1 combat feel blijft PENDING

userFeatureLog.userWords: speciale enemies intro song met special effects
userFeatureLog.code: triggerSpecialEnemyIntro, SONGS.elite, sting eliteIntro/bossIntro/superBossIntro, introT aura

userFeatureLog.userWords: Meer bgm difference en goed letten op wapen geluiden
userFeatureLog.note: off-d20 user feature; d1 blijft PENDING

userFeatureLog.userWords: bewegend decor ala chupacabrago, bolletje bovenaan progress, hak in 3 delen, go op 1
userFeatureLog.code: worldX scroll, traveling, drawBackground parallax, drawStageProgress 3 segmenten, stagePart, drawTravelSpeedLines, drawStageBeatFx
userFeatureLog.note: deel 2 (v1.14.1): stageFx dusk/rotsen/fakkels + silhouetten; deel 3 (v1.14.5): checkpoint-flits + diamantjes, camera-punch bij vertrek, speed-lines, baas-hartslag + roar + aankomst-flits

userFeatureLog.userWords: super bosses on random, super allies based on Gamble dice games, buff for that Stage
userFeatureLog.code: gambleScreen, rollStageGamble, GAMBLE_ALLIES, applyGambleToStage, superBoss Monster
